items.front: Under 2-7-1, what term do USAF/USA use for estimated altimeter settings?
Under 2-7-2, when must the source of an altimeter setting be identified?
items.back: TERMINAL: when issued for a location other than departure/destination airport. EN ROUTE: all altimeter settings.

items.front: Under 2-7-2, how often must en route controllers issue altimeter settings to each aircraft?
items.back: At least one time while operating in their area of jurisdiction. Issue the setting for the nearest reporting station along the route.

items.front: Under 2-7-3, at what pressure do high barometric pressure procedures activate?
Under 2-7-3, what is the altimeter setting for arrivals during high pressure?
items.back: Set 31.00 until reaching the final approach fix. Phraseology: 'ALTIMETER (setting) HIGH BAROMETRIC PRESSURE RESTRICTIONS IN EFFECT, SET THREE ONE ZERO ZERO UNTIL REACHING THE FINAL APPROACH FIX.'
